ksa_text: Design, implement, and conduct quality assurance testing and validation procedures for data systems, datasets, and analytical processes.

Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
